content:
✨ Constrict | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Compressing video files to meet specific size limits for uploads or storage, without manual trial-and-error.
✨ Key Features: • Compress videos to target file sizes • Automatic calculation of ABR, resolution, framerate, and audio quality • Bulk compression of multiple videos • Customization of framerate limits • Choice of codecs (H.264, HEVC, AV1, VP9)
📖 Summary: Constrict is a desktop application designed to compress video files to a specific target file size. It automates the process of calculating necessary encoding parameters like bitrate, resolution, and framerate, offering a user-friendly interface for bulk video compression.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
